title: Reactions
description: A mod that adds dynamic expressions and facial personality to players.
body:
**Reactions** is a mod that adds life to player models with customizable vanilla-friendly face. --- **⚠️ This mod is in early development so there may be missing animations and other errors!** **✨ Current Features** * **Blinking:** Animated eyelid movement * **Using Spyglass:** Characters close one eye realistically when aiming with a spyglass * **Custom Configuration:** You can adjust eye size * _More in future..._ --- * For questions and suggestions join to the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Bg5js3eHJC) # **🚀 Roadmap**
Spoiler 🐛 Fix major bugs and visual inconsistencies
👋 Add more expressions based on player actions
🎙️ Add support for Simple Voice Chat (mouth/face movement while speaking)
🎨 Improve compatibility with non-standard/custom skins
⚙️ Expand configuration options
